creator: dgilbert@velocet.ca
text:
QCad 1.4.0 on FreeBSD-4.0-STABLE has bugs.  1.4.1 is better
according the author

Fix: NB: I didn't look for differences in PLIST 'cause the instructions on
the ports creator web page don't work.  Specifically, if I already had
dependant ports installed, I couldn't install them into the test tree.
	
How-To-Repeat: 
	Install qcad, play with splines.  Will crash.
